title: Spicy Crumbly Thai Swede Crumble
description: A festive plant-based-friendly dish featuring swede baked with a spicy crumbly topping for an autumnal treat.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons coconut oil
ingredients.notes: For vegan options, use a neutral-flavored vegetable shortening or olive oil.

ingredients.name: Pinch of salt and black pepper
4 tablespoons almond meal (or other gluten-free oats)
3-4 tablespoons coconut sugar or maple syrup

instructions: Combine swede, oil, lime juice, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper in a large mixing bowl.
Stir in almond meal until mixture is crumbly but holds together when pressed.
Transfer swede mixture into an ovenproof dish.
Sprinkle coconut sugar or maple syrup evenly over the top of the swede mixture.
Bake for 30-45 minutes, stirring once halfway through cooking, until edges are golden brown and topping is crispy.
